evals.prompt: Use the scout skill to identify improvement opportunities in the file skills/scout/evals/fixture.py
evals.expected_output: Top 3 ranked suggestions with categories, scores, and code snippets

assertions.name: top3_format
assertions.check: output contains 3 numbered/ranked suggestions in a summary table

assertions.name: categories_used
assertions.check: output references at least one scout category (dead-code, naming, magic-values, deprecated-patterns, simplification)

assertions.name: scoring_present
assertions.check: output contains Impact and Low-Risk scores (e.g., 4x5=20 or I=4, R=5, or composite score)

assertions.name: code_context
assertions.check: output includes specific code snippets or line references from fixture.py

assertions.name: effort_estimates
assertions.check: output includes effort level (trivial, small, or medium)
